subject: Re: Het hele interview met Steve Bannon | Nieuwsuur
body:
This drives me f*ing crazy.

Simple question for your boy: Did Donald Trump actively promote the theory that Barak Obama was not born in the US and was therefore not a legitimate President?

Answer: Yes.

He should not defend that shit. He can defend populist/nationalism all he wants, but when he bullies people defending obvious Trump lies, he loses credibility.
body_html:
